messages.body: Hi, if you record your name and reason for calling, I'll see if this person is available. Kripali. Thanks, please stay.

Hi, if you record your name and reason for calling, I'll see if this person is available. Hi Rhonda, this is Chintan from Zoka. I am the head of product here and I take care of the discovery agent, which helps you get le…
Thank you I appreciate that. It's very unfortunate. Hopefully my business gets back on track soon and if it does, I will absolutely reinstate the service. ￼
I hope everything works out well for you and we could work together on the future! :)  Please feel free to reach out to me here, anytime. I’ll be happy to help.

I didnt have time to read this last message before you charged me. Cancel this service please. I cannot afford it. The money you took from my account this month doesn't allow me to pay my water bill that's due right now.…
Thank you so much, Ronda. That really means a lot to us. We’d love to have you back with us again :)
Hey Ronda,  Hope you’re doing well!   Sure, I will inform the team to proceed with the cancellation and the amount deducted for this month is going to be refunded back to you.
Terrible. I have a few appointments, but it's all existing clients ￼

Hey Ronda,  Don’t lose hope! We’ve seen a good increase in the amount of profile clicks ever since you’re on, boarded with us back in June and July. It was around 130 and 170 respectively and and now it’s up to 268, whic…
Would you be able to ask your friends and family for reviews? That’ll really help push your profile.   And as promised, the payments going forward would be reduced to $150 a month as well.
